messages.content: make a sentence using known as
He is known as the best chef in town.
too short
He is known as a brilliant scientist, revered for his groundbreaking research and innovative discoveries.
make a sentence using with....Vpp
With his vibrant personality and positive outlook, he brings joy and laughter to every gathering he attends.
again
With his voice filled with passion and his fingers skillfully dancing across the piano keys, he mesmerizes the audience with his captivating Vpp performance.
again
Equipped with state-of-the-art technology, the Vpp system enhances the visual experience, immersing viewers in lifelike and vivid landscapes.
With his voice filled with passion
and his guitar strumming in perfect harmony, he captivates the audience with his soul-stirring Vpp performance.
make a sentence using With his voice filled with passion
With his voice filled with passion, he serenades the crowd, effortlessly hitting high notes that send chills down their spines.
make a sentence using with only... to...
With only a flicker of hope to guide him, he embarked on a treacherous journey to find his long-lost family.
make a sentence using coming in fourth
Despite all the hard work and dedication, he ended up coming in fourth place in the race.
make a new sentence using whose as a relative pronoun
The teacher praised the student whose essay received the highest score in the class.
make a sentence using what has been
She finally opened up about what has been bothering her for months.
make a well-written sentence using whereas
John prefers to relax at home during the weekends, whereas his younger brother enjoys going out with friends and exploring new places.
make a well-written sentence using "leaves no time to"
His demanding work schedule leaves no time to pursue his passion for painting, much to his dismay.
make a well-written sentence using rise to an alarming degree
In recent years, the global temperature has been rising to an alarming degree, causing great concerns about the future of our planet.
make a well-written sentence using Not until...
Not until I tasted her homemade cookies did I realize what a talented baker she was.
another one
Not until the rain stopped did the children venture outside to play.
make a well-written sentence using it was not until
It was not until she moved away that he realized how much he truly missed her presence in his life.
make a well-written sentence using Not only was
Not only was she able to solve the complex math problem, but she also explained the solution to her classmates in a clear and concise manner.
make a well-written sentence using not...until...
Not until he experienced a life-threatening accident did he truly appreciate the value of his own existence.
make a well-written sentence using than those of
Her innovative ideas and creative solutions resulted in higher profits than those of her competitors.
make a well-written sentence using similar to that of
His painting style is similar to that of a renowned artist, with vibrant colors and bold brushstrokes that evoke strong emotions in viewers.
make a well-written sentence using by the time for future
By the time for future generations to inherit the Earth, let's ensure we have made conscious choices to preserve and protect the environment.
make a well-written sentence using by the time, the sentence context should be future tense
By the time they graduate, self-driving cars will have become a common mode of transportation in major cities.
make a well-written sentence using by the time, the sentence context should be past tense
By the time I arrived at the party, everyone had already left and the lights were turned off.
make a well-written sentence using nothing but
She wore nothing but a simple white dress, showcasing her natural beauty and effortless elegance.
make a well-written sentence using with...inside it
With the intricate design, the antique jewelry box had delicate engravings of flowers and leaves, creating a stunning masterpiece with a hidden compartment inside it.
again
With a mischievous smile, he handed her the small gift box, and as she opened it, she discovered a heartfelt note tucked inside, expressing his love and admiration for her.
make a  sentence using with ____ inside it
With a loud creak, he opened the old wooden chest and discovered a hidden compartment inside it, revealing a stack of love letters tied with a faded ribbon.
